p2p_enrich.notes: CI commands discovered: bun lint (fails - oxlint config error), bun typecheck (fails - tsc not installed), bun run banned (fails on base - expected as it detects the bug being fixed), zig fmt --check (works), bun test (requires bun build first). p2p_enrichment node already completed with 3 repo_tests pass_to_pass gates: (1) test_repo_modified_files_valid - validates modified Zig files exist and have valid structure, (2) test_repo_ban_words_config_valid - validates ban-limits.json and ban-words.test.ts exist and are parseable, (3) test_repo_test_infrastructure_valid - validates test/harness.ts, test/regression/issue directory, and test/internal directory exist.
